title: Velvety Fermented Italian Taleggio Lasagna
description: A midnight craving lasagna with fermented taleggio, spinach, and ricotta folded in an iron teppan for a silky texture.
instructions: Preheat an iron teppan over medium heat and lightly oil it.
In a bowl whisk the egg with ricotta, salt, pepper, and half the basil, then fold in shredded taleggio until creamy.
Blanch the spinach for 30 seconds, drain, and squeeze out excess water before adding to the ricotta mixture.
Spread a thin layer of tomato passata on the teppan, then lay down two lasagna sheets and spread the cheese mixture over them.
Repeat the layering twice more, finishing with a sheet of lasagna on top and cover with the remaining passata.
Cover the teppan with a lid and cook for 22 minutes, then remove the lid and cook for an additional 8 minutes until the top is golden.
Let the lasagna rest for 5 minutes before slicing, then garnish with the remaining basil.
Serve hot straight from the teppan for a rustic, velvety experience.
